summary: Verified all 3 subscription safety fixes for Battwheels OS SaaS platform
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test organizations during testing (will have prefix testfix_ and trialtest_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 subscription safety fixes verified working: (1) 409 duplicate prevention via subscription_orders collection check, (2) LIVE Razorpay key warning logged in dev env, (3) Auto-assign trial fields on org signup. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_subscription_safety_fixes.py

fix_1_duplicate_prevention.description: POST /api/v1/subscriptions/subscribe returns 409 when org has active/created/authenticated subscription

fix_2_live_key_warning.description: Backend logs WARNING when LIVE Razorpay keys (rzp_live_*) used in non-production environment

fix_3_auto_trial_fields.description: New org signup sets subscription_status='trialing', trial_active=True, trial_start and trial_end (14 days from now)
